summary: P2 refactor regression testing for Trading Calculator PRO. Backend: 10/10 tests passed in /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_p2.py covering (a) spec-exact math for payoff/greeks/pnl-attribution/assignment after _legs_to_dicts + _payoff_summary helper extraction; (b) journal/stats schema after _empty_journal_stats + _aggregate_journal_trades + _journal_stats_from_aggregate refactor (demo user → all 11 fields = 0); (c) Monte Carlo statistics block (avgFinalBalance, profitProbability, percentile5/50/95, riskOfRuin, avgMaxDrawdown) after _simulate_one_mc_path + _summarize_mc_runs extraction; (d) backtest schema (final_balance, total_trades 50–150, win_rate, roi, max_drawdown, profit_factor, trades[≤20]) after _simulate_backtest_trades extraction; (e) iv-rank for AAPL returns available=true with ivRank/ivPercentile/recommendation∈{sell_premium|buy_premium|neutral} AND CRITICALLY confirms recommendationLabel/recommendationReason are ABSENT (i18n migration verified); (f) OHLC BTC?days=7 sanity returns ~168 candles; (g) /api/optimize AAPL bullish still returns ranked strategies. Math values: assignment Sell 2 puts strike=100 expiry=95 → net_shares=200, net_cash_flow=-20000.0 EXACT; long call payoff maxProfit=4749.35, maxLoss=-500.65, totalFees=0.65, BE=155.0 EXACT. Frontend (demo@btccalc.pro/1234, logged in OK→/dashboard): LandingPage testimonial cards render (15 star icons found, key change `star-${authorKey}-${i}` works); /options calculator renders PayoffChart (1 recharts svg + 2 reference lines for strike/BE — labelObj/breakEvenLabels memoization works); toggle-greeks expands to 6 recharts svgs (GreeksTimeChart xDomain/xAxisLabel/expirationLineLabel memoization works, no JSX runtime errors); tab-flow renders Unusual Options Activity table cleanly (TradeAdvancedPanel assignment list key `${a.leg}-${a.strike}` works). Only 1 console error: pre-existing LegEditor <span> inside <option> hydration warning (already documented in iteration_2.json, NOT a regression).

issues: Pre-existing (NOT regression): LegEditor.jsx line ~173 renders <span data-ve-dynamic=true> inside <option> — invalid HTML, fires React hydration warning. Already flagged in iteration_2.json. Recommend rendering option label as plain text.

critical_code_review_comments: Helper extraction is clean & correct: _empty_journal_stats / _aggregate_journal_trades / _journal_stats_from_aggregate (server.py:492–567) are single-pass and preserve schema bit-for-bit. _simulate_one_mc_path / _summarize_mc_runs (~line 700–765) and _simulate_backtest_trades (~line 796–832) keep all RNG calls inside the helper, so determinism semantics are unchanged. _legs_to_dicts + _payoff_summary shared between payoff/greeks/pnl-attribution/assignment endpoints — DRY win.

/api/options/iv-rank correctly removes recommendationLabel/recommendationReason — verified absent in response. Frontend IVRankBadge.jsx i18n maps the recommendation key ∈ {sell_premium,buy_premium,neutral}. PRD line ~145 documented.

Math accuracy verified spec-exact: long call (strike=150 prem=5 stockPrice=150 fee=0.65) → maxProfit=4749.35, maxLoss=-500.65, totalFees=0.65, BE=[155.0]. Sell 2 puts (strike=100, expiry stock=95) → net_shares=200, net_cash_flow=-20000.0. No off-by-one or sign errors.

PayoffChart.jsx memoization (optionStrikes.labelObj, breakEvenLabels): verified by 2 reference lines rendering on /options calculator. GreeksTimeChart memoization (xDomain, xAxisLabel, expirationLineLabel): verified by 6 recharts svgs after toggle-greeks click — no runtime errors.

LandingPage testimonial Star key (`star-${authorKey}-${i}`) and TradeAdvancedPanel assignment row key (`${a.leg}-${a.strike}`): both render without React duplicate-key warnings (none found in console).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (testimonials + payoff chart + greeks chart + flow tab all render, 0 new JS errors)

test_credentials: demo@btccalc.pro / 1234 (premium lifetime, seeded). Login works → /dashboard, JWT issued.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 refactor verified clean — pure refactor, no behavior change. All math endpoints preserve exact pre-refactor output. journal/stats / monte-carlo / backtest / iv-rank schemas unchanged. Frontend memo refactors (PayoffChart label/breakEven, GreeksTimeChart xDomain/xAxisLabel/expirationLineLabel) render correctly. Stable-key refactors (LandingPage star, TradeAdvancedPanel assignment) work without React key warnings. Pre-existing LegEditor <span> inside <option> hydration warning is the only console error and was carried over from iteration_2.json. CoinGecko free tier may 429 on rapid retest — tests have retry/skip. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_p1.py (P1, OHLC) + /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_p2.py (P2, journal/MC/backtest/iv-rank/spec math) — both green.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions found. P2 refactor (helper extraction in get_journal_stats, run_monte_carlo, run_backtest, opt_calculate_payoff/greeks/pnl-attribution/assignment, get_iv_rank + frontend memo/key fixes) preserves all behavior.
